latHint: Think babysitting and looking after kids all evening.
pivHint: LOVED is what Jesus says He has done for His disciples. It's also the word for the people closest to you - your LOVED ones. If you gave them constant attention and concern, what would you say you'd done for them?
winText: You found it. To be LOVED is to be CARED for - and Jesus says as I have LOVED you, so love one another. That's what love looks like in action.
lossText: The word was CARED. LOVED was the pivot - what Jesus says He has done for us, and the everyday word for looking after someone.
votdVerse: A new command I give you: Love one another. As I have loved you, so you must love one another.
passageText: My children, I will be with you only a little longer. You will look for me, and just as I told the Jews, so I tell you now: Where I am going, you cannot come. A new command I give you: Love one another. As I have loved you, so you must love one another.
